title: Update golang.org/x/exp digest to f0f767c
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [golang.org/x/exp](https://togithub.com/golang/exp) | require | digest | `5e25df0` -> `f0f767c` |

---

### Configuration

📅 **Schedule**: Branch creation - "after 1am and before 11am on the first day of the month" in timezone UTC, Automerge - At any time (no schedule defined).

🚦 **Automerge**: Disabled by config. Please merge this manually once you are satisfied.

♻ **Rebasing**: Whenever PR is behind base branch, or you tick the rebase/retry checkbox.

🔕 **Ignore**: Close this PR and you won't be reminded about this update again.

comments.body:
@mtrmac this PR seems to be receiving digest updates outside the schedule :confused: I wonder if that's simply because it was already open before I made the schedule change? 

I don't see a bunch of other digest-update PRs open, so hopefully this is the case - renovate is trying to be "smart".  Let me know if you'd like me to investigate further.

> @mtrmac this PR seems to be receiving digest updates outside the schedule 😕 I wonder if that's simply because it was already open before I made the schedule change?

I agree that seems likely. Let’s close it and find out; hopefully that will make further investigation unnecessary.

> I don't see a bunch of other digest-update PRs open

FWIW the `golang.org/x/*` modules (other than this `x/exp`), which motivated the desire for infrequent updates have all started making ~monthly releases, so not seeing other digest updates is not that informative any more.
